agent.name: ux-flow-auditor
agent.role: Audit UX flow, copy consistency, accessibility, and empty states across all app routes.

findings.title: Inconsistent Login Terminology
findings.description: The terms 'Sign in', 'Log in', and 'Open login' are used interchangeably across authentication components.
findings.impact: Mixed terminology reduces trust and creates confusion for returning users who expect consistent language.

suggested_fix.approach: Use a single consistent term for the login action (e.g., 'Log In') across all authentication components.

history.notes: Discovered during copy-consistency audit of authentication components.

findings.title: Inconsistent Save Terminology
findings.description: 'Save Changes', 'Save', and 'Automatically save changes' are used with varying casing and patterns.

proof_hooks.summary: Inconsistent save label variants in smart-defaults-types

findings.impact: Inconsistent save labels erode trust in data persistence and may cause users to repeat save actions unnecessarily.

suggested_fix.approach: Standardize casing and phrasing for fundamental actions like save across all components.

findings.title: Placeholder Text in Production
findings.description: Found 'Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.' text strings exposed in UI weight definitions.

proof_hooks.summary: Lorem ipsum placeholder found in signatures domain file

findings.impact: Placeholder text appearing in production degrades professional appearance and may confuse users or appear in AI-generated outputs.

suggested_fix.approach: Remove lorem ipsum placeholders and replace with real copy.

history.notes: Discovered during copy-consistency audit of domain files.

findings.title: Missing Error Boundaries
findings.description: Major sections like ProjectsPage, SettingsPage, and Admin Metrics lack error boundaries. Only WorkspacePage implements one.

proof_hooks.summary: Route components registered without ErrorBoundary wrappers in App.tsx

findings.impact: An unhandled runtime error in any major page will crash the entire application, losing all user state and requiring a full page reload.

suggested_fix.approach: Wrap major route components in ErrorBoundary to prevent full app crashes.

history.notes: Discovered during missing-state audit of route structure.

findings.title: Unhelpful Empty States
findings.description: Workspace empty state notes it is 'intentional, not instructional' with no guidance for the user on what to do next.

proof_hooks.summary: Empty state intentionally provides no instructional copy

findings.impact: Users who encounter an empty workspace have no clear path to their first success, increasing abandonment at the activation step.

suggested_fix.approach: Empty states should guide the user toward their first action with a clear call-to-action.

history.notes: Discovered during missing-state audit of workspace surface.

findings.title: Unhelpful Image Alt Text
findings.description: Images use unhelpful alt text like 'Generated' or just '{asset.name}' directly without providing structural context for screen readers.

proof_hooks.summary: Generic or interpolated alt attributes on img elements in DesignCanvas

findings.impact: Screen reader users cannot understand the purpose or content of AI-generated images, making key features inaccessible.

suggested_fix.approach: Provide descriptive alt text distinguishing purpose and meaning for screen readers.

history.notes: Discovered during accessibility audit of design canvas components.

findings.title: Undefined Product Voice
findings.description: The intended product voice and tone are not explicitly defined in the observed design tokens or documentation.

proof_hooks.summary: No voice or tone guidelines found across the app's design system or documentation

findings.impact: Without a defined voice guide, contributors write copy in different registers, producing an inconsistent brand experience across features.

suggested_fix.approach: Propose and document a default voice guide (e.g., clear, concise, professional) in the design system or docs.

history.notes: Identified as an open question during copy-consistency audit; requires human decision on brand voice.

next_actions.action: Standardize authentication and system action terminology across the app's components.
next_actions.rationale: Mixed login terminology ('Sign in', 'Log in', 'Open login') erodes user trust and creates an inconsistent brand voice.

next_actions.action: Implement ErrorBoundary components at the route component level in App.tsx.
next_actions.rationale: Missing error boundaries cause full app crashes on any unhandled error in major pages, resulting in total loss of user state.

next_actions.action: Draft a product voice guide to align on tone, personality, and capitalization conventions.
next_actions.rationale: Without a defined voice guide, contributors produce inconsistent copy register across features.

next_actions.action: Update workspace empty states to include clear primary calls-to-action.
next_actions.rationale: Users who encounter an empty workspace with no guidance are likely to abandon before reaching their first success.

next_actions.action: Audit all tags and update alt attributes to be meaningful.
next_actions.rationale: Generic or interpolated alt text makes AI-generated image features inaccessible to screen reader users.
